feedItems.description: allocated £4.6m to Environment & Streets (≈£40 per resident)
allocated £2.3m to Culture & Leisure (≈£20 per resident)
allocated £4.4m to Council Running Costs (≈£39 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £105 (4.9%) to £2260
